mode.title: Mode
mode.description: author = posts from a handle (no login); profile = account stats (no login); search = keyword search (requires app password).

limit.title: Max records
limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (1–500).

identifier.title: Bluesky handle (for search auth)
identifier.description: Your Bluesky handle (e.g. you.bsky.social). Required for search mode — used to obtain an auth token.

appPassword.title: Bluesky app password (for search auth)
appPassword.description: Create at bsky.app → Settings → App Passwords. NOT your main password.

includeReplies.title: Include replies (author mode)
includeReplies.description: Author mode: include the account's replies. Turn off for original posts only.

includeReposts.title: Include reposts (author mode)
includeReposts.description: Author mode: include posts the account reposted (each tagged isRepost).

since.title: Since date (search mode)
since.description: Search mode: only posts on/after this date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO timestamp).

until.title: Until date (search mode)
until.description: Search mode: only posts before this date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO timestamp).

lang.title: Language (search mode)
lang.description: Search mode: 2-letter language code to filter by, e.g. 'en', 'es'.

tag.title: Hashtag (search mode)
tag.description: Search mode: restrict to posts carrying this hashtag (no # sign).

searchAuthor.title: From author (search mode)
searchAuthor.description: Search mode: restrict results to posts by this handle.
